data.title: Helser Brothers unveiling Vervo Motorized Traverse French Pole at CWC 2025, offering elegance and automation.
data.description: The recently launched Vervo Motorized Traverse French Pole combines sophistication with contemporary automation, presenting designers with a unique combination. Revealed in CHANDLER, Ariz., on Sept. 19, 2025, by Helser Brothers, a leading custom drapery hardware producer, this innovative product aims to provide a seamless blend of style and functionality.

data.title: Contact Robbins LLP if you lost money in LNTH stock. Class action filed for those who acquired LNTH securities from Feb 26, 2025 to Aug 5, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to stockholders regarding a class action lawsuit filed for individuals and entities who bought or acquired Lantheus Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNTH) stocks between February 26, 2025, and August 5, 2025. Lantheus Holdings, Inc. is a company...

data.title: Perpetua Resources celebrates progress on Stibnite Gold Project with officials from Idaho, U.S. Army, Department of Defense, and Department of Agriculture. U.S. Forest Service Notice to Proceed received for imminent development.
data.description: The kick-off celebration for the Stibnite Gold Project in Idaho was attended by notable figures including the Governor, U.S. Army representatives, Department of Defense officials, and officials from the U.S. Department of Agriculture. The event followed the U.S. Forest Service's Notice to Proceed, allowing the project to commence development upon the fulfillment of financial requirements.
FTX set to distribute $1.6B in bankruptcy repayments this month.

data.title: Winter Fest OC, SoCal's largest winter festival, returns Nov 28 to Jan 4 at OC Fair & Event Center featuring lights, snow, live entertainment, and festive fun.
data.description: The biggest winter festival in Southern California, Winter Fest OC, is set to make a comeback from November 28th to January 4th at the OC Fair & Event Center in Costa Mesa. The event is scheduled to run for approximately 38 days, offering visitors a winter wonderland experience in the heart of the region. Guests can expect a variety of festive activities and attractions suitable for all ages to enjoy.

data.title: Boston Teamsters at Local 25 win strike against Republic Services, ratify record contract as waste strike continues in Georgia on September 19, 2025.
data.description: Workers from Teamsters Local 25 have successfully ratified a new contract amidst a major strike against Republic Services in Georgia. The waste corporation, worth billions of dollars, faced a historic battle as the workers fought for their rights. The contract approval comes as a significant win for the workers, with key details of the agreement not explicitly revealed. This development marks a crucial milestone in the ongoing labor strike, highlighting the determination and unity of the workers in securing better terms.

data.title: Nikola Corp informs stockholders about derivative litigation in various actions. Important: Delaware Chancery, Federal, and Arizona Federal Derivative Actions.
data.description: A press release was issued on Sept. 19, 2025, in Phoenix, regarding derivative litigation involving Nikola Corporation. The litigation is occurring in the Delaware Chancery Action, the Delaware Federal Derivative Action, the Arizona Federal Derivative Action, and the Demand Made Derivative Action. Stockholders of Nikola Corporation are informed about these legal proceedings.

data.title: CEA Industries plans $250M stock buyback program, Nasdaq listed as BNC, aiming to boost shareholder value.
data.description: In New York on September 19, 2025, CEA Industries Inc. (Nasdaq: BNC), a key player in BNB holding and promotion, disclosed its plan to buy back $250 million worth of its common stock, as approved by the Board of Directors. This initiative underscores BNC’s commitment to enhancing shareholder value and confidence in the market.

data.title: Buhler completes interim heliport for Oakland children's hospital ahead of schedule, ensuring emergency access.
data.description: In San Francisco, Buhler Commercial Construction has recently finished constructing a new interim heliport for a children's hospital located in Oakland. This heliport specifically serves as a crucial landing area for emergency medical transport during the extensive renovation of the hospital's primary heliport. Completed earlier than expected, this project guarantees continuous emergency access for patients and medical staff. The heliport was meticulously designed and constructed prioritizing speed, safety, and accuracy, ensuring it functions seamlessly as a temporary solution.

data.title: Law firm investigating data breach at Family & Community Services Inc. in Ohio. Customers' data compromised. Date: Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Portage County, Ohio, the law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP has initiated an investigation into data privacy allegations concerning a hacking incident at Family & Community Services Inc ("Family & Community Services"). The organization became aware of a data breach around that time and is actively reviewing the situation. The firm is looking into the matter to determine the extent of the breach and any potential impact on the information compromised.

data.title: NBA player Kevin Durant regains control of his Coinbase account after almost 10 years, CEO confirms.
data.description: After approximately ten years of being unable to access his Coinbase account, NBA athlete Kevin Durant has regained control of his Bitcoin assets. This development was confirmed by the CEO of the exchange platform.

data.title: Remilia introduces Milady Social Network for '4chan diaspora,' catering to a community disillusioned by the current web.
data.description: Remilia Corporation will be launching a new social media platform exclusively for the Milady community, aiming to address concerns about the current state of the internet. This decision comes amidst growing dissatisfaction with existing platforms and a desire for more tailored online experiences. With the new network, users can expect a more focused space for interaction and engagement. This move reflects the corporation's commitment to catering to the specific needs of the Milady community, which boasts a significant number of members. The platform is set to offer a range of features and functionalities to enhance the online experience for this demographic.

data.title: CASEKOO sells over 1.27 million Magic Stand Cases in the US since 2021, showing strong market success.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, CASEKOO, a renowned company specializing in premium smartphone protective accessories, revealed that they have sold more than 1.27 million units of their Magic Stand Case in the United States since its launch in 2021. This impressive sales achievement was fueled by the innovative features and high-quality design of the product, establishing CASEKOO as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Faraday Future invests $41 million in Qualigen Therapeutics, Inc. for crypto business via PIPE transaction.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) and Qualigen Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: QLGN) disclosed a partnership agreement for a private investment in public equity (PIPE) in QLGN’s common stock and preferred stock. Faraday Future, a California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, and QLGN will also commence operations in the Crypto and web3 space. This collaboration marks an important milestone for both companies and signifies their entrance into new ventures.

data.title: FTX Recovery Trust will disburse $1.6B to creditors in September, part of a total $16.5B being distributed.
data.description: The third payment to former exchange creditors has been distributed, with a total of $16.5 billion to be dispersed as part of ongoing payouts.
